title.en: The half-step sevenfold ancestor of these battl...

content.en:
The half-step sevenfold ancestor of these battles belonged to several forces, and one of them was a half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Xuanyu Pavilion.

This half-step sevenfold ancestor was also the Dao Ancestor who used the treasure to trap the purple-blooded elf, so many Dao Ancestors directly besieged him.

At this moment, he has been severely injured, but he is still reluctant to leave.

Ye Tian didn't have the idea of saving the other party, after all, the two sides were not familiar with each other, maybe if he rescued, this Dao Ancestor might let him resist the attacks of other Dao Ancestors, kill the purple blood elf himself, take the purple blood golden pith, and then escape.

He didn't want to be cheated, even if the other party made a promise, but there was no guarantee of the promise, it was almost meaningless.

Soon, the half-step sevenfold ancestor of the Xuanyu Pavilion couldn't stand it, and directly collected the treasure that trapped the purple blood elf and fled directly.

And the other half-step Sevenfold Ancestors naturally wouldn't chase after them, after all, their target was only the Purple Blood Golden Piceth.

"Get out, the purple blood golden pith is mine!"

A half-step sevenfold ancestor who had broken the boundary fifty times said coldly.

However, at this time, who cares who you are and what strength you have, sometimes it is not necessarily strong, and you can snatch it.

The more powerful the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor, the more likely it will be targeted by other Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor.

These half-step sevenfold ancestors fought into a mess, and that purple blood spirit was quickly exploded, and a cloud of purple blood golden pith appeared, with about hundreds of drops.

At this time.

Ye Tian made a move!

Rumble!!!!!

The Endless Black Domain, the Endless Extreme Speed, the Endless Primordial Body, and the Endless Golden Light exploded instantly, making Ye Tian's strength reach an incomparably terrifying level.

Then there is an endless light shield to protect the whole body and resist the attacks of other Dao Ancestors.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian directly flew the other Dao Ancestors, grabbed this large ball of purple blood and golden pith with one hand, and then fled as quickly as possible.

"Leave me !!"

A venerable half-step sevenfold ancestor was furious and tried to intercept Ye Tian.

However, the strength of these Dao Ancestors was not good, so they naturally couldn't intercept Ye Tian and let Ye Tian escape.

Abrupt.

An incomparably powerful half-step sevenfold ancestor appeared, and the moment he appeared, Ye Tian trembled.

"It's also a half-step sevenfold ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and he has broken the boundary many times more times than me!"

Ye Tian knew that he was far from being the opponent of the other party, so he used the escaped treasures one by one.

At this time, that Dao Ancestor struck from the air.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's small half of his body was directly shattered, but with a large number of primordial ancient beads, his injuries recovered quickly.

Escaping again and again, coupled with Ye Tian's speed being fast enough, the other party quickly gave up.

After all, it was just some purple blood and golden pith, and there was no need to chase him all the time.

So, that Dao Ancestor gave up.

"Sure enough, when I meet those half-step sevenfold ancestors who have broken through the boundaries many times and comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, I am far from being an opponent!"

Ye Tian was going to keep a low profile next.

Among the half-step sevenfold ancestors who comprehended the eightfold yuan dao, his strength was invincible for the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestors, but when he encountered the half-step sevenfold ancestors who comprehended the ninefold yuan dao, there were many people who were stronger than him.

And in the realm of the Hanhai Region, it is not uncommon for Dao Ancestors to comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and some of them stay in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

These half-step sevenfold ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao also have a very clear goal, that is, to break the eighty-one boundaries, otherwise they will not be willing to break through to become the Sevenfold Ancestors!

But it is too difficult to break through the eighty-one boundaries, so many half-step sevenfold ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao have been stranded in this realm for countless years, and they have not chosen to break through so far.

......

Time passed slowly, and more and more half-step sevenfold ancestors gained great gains, but there were also many half-step sevenfold ancestors who were killed.

this day.

Ye Tian approached a special area, and the copying talent suddenly had a special induction, as if there was some treasure attracting him.

At this moment, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

"The treasure that made the replication talent promotion !!"

He thought that it was already the limit for his copying talent to be upgraded to this level, but he didn't expect that there was still hope for upgrading.

"For me, the current copying talent is still of great use only to copy the body, but there is no point in copying other talents, and it is useless to copy more Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment. If I copy the talent to upgrade, maybe I will have a new ability, and my potential will skyrocket!"

So, Ye Tian slowly went to that unknown place.

Just as he was approaching that place, Ye Tian suddenly stopped.

"There are primordial artifacts comparable to the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors!"

Ye Tian sensed the existence of such primordial artifacts with ancient occult techniques, so he didn't dare to move on, otherwise such a primordial artifact might kill him in one blow.

There are no weak primordial antiquities, and they are primordial antiquities comparable to the level of the sevenfold primordial ancestor, maybe comparable to the middle or even late stage of the sevenfold primordial ancestor!

Therefore, he didn't dare to bet!

"What should I do, the treasure that can allow me to copy the talent upgrade is in this area where the original antiquities are staying, how can I take this treasure away?"

Ye Tian was thinking silently here.

Ask other Dao Ancestors to help? That's unrealistic, he can sense the existence of this primordial artifact, and other Dao Ancestors can naturally do it too.

They wouldn't be foolish enough to provoke this primordial artifact!

"There is only one way, then make a copy of the body to lure away this primordial artifact, as long as the strength of this primordial artifact is not too strong, I should be able to withstand it for a while, and this moment of time is enough for me to take that treasure!"

After Ye Tian figured it out, he was ready to do so.

Instantly, he sped up time and began to replicate his body.

Soon, the replicating body was copied.

One copy body was hidden, and the copy body of the other blank body took some of the primordial ancient beads and went straight up.

......

In the dark and formless void, a primordial ancient person who was shrouded in darkness sensed Ye Tian's arrival and entered the scope of its realm.

In an instant, it moved, as if it had opened a pair of eyes that could not be looked directly in the darkness.

The next moment, its aura burst out, and its figure was completely revealed, appearing in Ye Tian's sight.

Then, it went straight to the shot.

Ye Tian sensed that this primordial ancient man had made a move, so he directly defended it with all his strength, and refined the primordial ancient beads one by one, just to save his life.

Abrupt.

A finger crossed everything, directly shattering Ye Tian's endless light shield and bombarding Ye Tian's body.

In an instant, half of Ye Tian's body was directly annihilated, but fortunately, the original Gu Zhu was saved.

"If I didn't have the Primordial Ancient Bead, I'm afraid I would be killed in two moves! The strength of this Primordial Artifact is much stronger than the ordinary Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor. "

Ye Tian quickly fled, and this primordial ancient man really left here and pursued him directly.

After all, once the primordial ancients set their sights on a cultivator, it was almost endless, unless the cultivator hid in a place such as a district boundary, the primordial ancients would give up chasing and killing.

But in this ancient nest, it is impossible for the primordial ancients to give up the pursuit.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Immediately, his other copy body went to the place where the treasure was located as fast as possible, trying to get the treasure as quickly as possible.
